conclusion: The .006 dashed RF-modulator option is not populated on the .009 target. Keep the .009 physical capacitor positions without importing .006 RF connectivity; the separate bracket X6 cable is target-photo-closed at A:3/SOUND_CLAMP and A:4/GND.

legacy_source.observation: The lower-right dashed option contains VT3/VT4, the adjustable L1/R73 RF network, and its dedicated bias/output passives.
legacy_source.group_bom_observation: The adjustable СП3-22б 4.7 kOhm part and the KT315/KT325 transistor population are assigned to ДГШ5.109.006.

target_evidence.assembly_observation: The overlapping placement views cover the complete .009 board drawing. They label VT1 and VT2, but no VT3/VT4, L1, or R73. In the FDC quadrant they instead label C9, C10, C11, C12, and C15 around D93-D102.
target_evidence.owner_observation: The documented 4x3 component-side tile set covers the complete owner board and corroborates the .009 assembly population: no VT3/VT4 RF cluster, adjustable L1, or R73 trimmer is populated.
